text.title: vui-accessibility-inclusivity Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report cites 8% overall WER; real users with non-native English see 28% WER.
antipattern.fix: Mandate per-slice WER; flag gaps >10 pp.

antipattern.symptom: Prompt 'Please confirm the establishment of your account' (grade 14) confuses users.
antipattern.root-cause: Author wrote prompt as formal text.
antipattern.fix: Run Flesch-Kincaid; rewrite to grade 8 or below.

antipattern.symptom: Deaf user cannot follow voice prompts; no transcript displayed.
antipattern.fix: Display rolling transcript per interaction; persist in-app log.

antipattern.symptom: Payment confirmation voice-only; user with speech impairment cannot complete.
antipattern.fix: Add tap/type fallback on the same surface.
